title: Dark Web Intercept: Telegram_RaaS_Syndicate - Potential Threat Activity

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Dark Web Intercept: Telegram_RaaS_Syndicate - Potential Thre
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/11
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '185.15.10.22'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*185.15.10.22*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 185.15.10.22 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Dark_Web_Intercept__Telegram_R"; sid:4716709; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 185.15.10.22 any (msg:"CDB APEX Dark_Web_Intercept__Telegram_R"; sid:4656684; rev:1;)
